nasb.text: The rain fell, and the floods came, and the winds blew and slammed against that house; and it fell—and great was its fall.”

esv.text: And the rain fell, and the floods came, and the winds blew and beat against that house, and it fell, and great was the fall of it.”

cnv.text: 雨淋、水沖、風吹，搖撼那房子，房子就倒塌了，並且倒塌得很厲害。”

ccb.text: 遇到风吹雨打、洪水冲击，房子就倒塌了，而且倒塌得很厉害。”

csbs.text: 大雨降下，急流冲来，狂风刮起，撞击那房子，房子就倒塌了，并且倒塌得非常厉害。”
